title: Ginger Ray Sleeps Until Christmas Hanging Advent Chalkboard Sign - Vintage Noel
features: Sign measures 21.5cm in length and 17cm in width.
Red and white ribbon is attached to the sign so it can be hung.
Use a stick of chalk or a chalkboard pen to write up your sleeps left remaining.
Perfect for use as a Christmas Hanging Wooden Decoration for counting the days down to Christmas Day!
Part of the Ginger Ray Vintage Noel range!
description: Product Description Count down the sleeps until Christmas Day with this lovely 'Sleeps Until Christmas' Chalkboard Hanging Christmas Tree Sign.Perfect for readying your home for the festive season and counting down the days until Christmas Day! Sign measures 21.5cm in length and 17cm in width. Red and white ribbon is attached to the sign so it can be hung. Use a stick of chalk or a chalkboard pen to write up your sleeps left remaining. Safety Warning No Warning
